Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.MagneticFluxDensity

    • Uses of MagneticFluxDensity in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return MagneticFluxDensity 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(double value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.
      static MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity arg1, MagneticFluxDensity arg2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adss two magnetic flux density instances.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity b, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density to current instance and returns a new magnetic flux density instance.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.
      static MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensityConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity input, MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a magnetic flux density value and unit.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.
      static MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.subtractAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity arg1, MagneticFluxDensity arg2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Subtracts two magnetic flux density instances.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.subtractAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity b, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density from current instance and returns a new instance.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void MagneticFluxDensity.add​(MagneticFluxDensity magneticFluxDensity)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density and updates current magnetic flux density instance.

      Adds provided magnetic flux density and stores the result into provided magnetic flux density instance.

      Adds two magnetic flux density instances and stores the result into provided instance.

      Adds provided magnetic flux density to current instance and returns a new magnetic flux density instance.

      Converts a magnetic flux density to provided output magnetic flux density unit.

      Converts and updates a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.

      Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.

      Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.

      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density and updates current magnetic flux density.

      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density and stores the result into provided magnetic flux density.

      Subtracts two magnetic flux density instances and stores the result into provided instance.
